Debug Mob Auth

Category: Reverse Engineering
Difficulty: Medium

A mobile client validates a privileged token with transformed byte checks.
There may also be a weakness in the debug-token parser.
Reverse the class and recover the real flag.

Run:
  java DebugMobAuth
or
  java DebugMobAuth "CH4KR4X2{example}"

Flag format:
  CH4KR4X2{...}
